programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E11 | The Best of Sickest Bad Beats & Suck Outs
programme.desc: Our favorite dirty beats and nasty suck outs. Featuring Doug Polk, Avi Freedman, Todd Brunson, Cate Hall, Rob Yong, Michael Zhang, John Duthie, Jared Bleznick, Rep Porter, Mike Sigel, Samantha Abernathy.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E12 | The Best of Hero Call Fails
programme.desc: A compilation of players making very brave calls that are incredibly wrong! Featuring Phil Hellmuth, Alec Torelli, Jennifer Tilly, Shaun Deeb, Greg Fishberg, Jeremy Kaufman, Ouri Ohayan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E13 | The Best of Worst Bluffs
programme.desc: A compilation of our favorite ill-timed and horribly wrong bluff attempts. Featuring Alec Torelli, Blake Bohn, Brandon Cantu, Joe McKeehan, Phil Laak, Esther Taylor, Jeremy Kaufman, Doug Polk.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E14 | The Best of Seven Deuce
programme.desc: An episode entirely devoted to players playing the worse hand in poker, 7-2. Featuring Kelly Minkin, Lily Kiletto, Elky Grospelier, Scott ball, Phil Laak, Antonio Esfandiari, Jason Somerville, Shaun Deeb, Kyle Bowler.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E15 | The Best Worst Fails II
programme.desc: An entire episode featuring epic fails from Poker Night. Featuring Rob Yong, Antonio Esfadnari, Samuel Chartier, Kyle Bowker, Todd Brunson, John Duthie, Shaun Deeb.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E16 | The Best of Hero Calls
programme.desc: A compilation of the best soul reads and hero calls. Featuring Avi Freedman, Mike Sigel, Danielle Andersen, Shaun Deeb, Samantha , Layne Flack,Abernathy, Mike Dentale, Cate Hall, Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Alec Torelli, Lauren Roberts.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E17 | The Best of Sickest Bluffs
programme.desc: Our favorite and most bada$$ bluffs on Poker Night. Featuring Kelly Minkin, Lily Kiletto, Sam Tricket, Antonio Esfandiari, Shaun Deeb, Samantha Abernathy, Mike Dentale, Alec Torelli, Jeremy Kaufman.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S08 E18 | The Best of Most Controversial/Dramatic
programme.desc: The essential and most memorable hands that defined Poker Night in America. Featuring Mike Matusow, Brandon Cantu, Alec Torelli, Dan Wolfe, Doug Polk, James Calderaro, Shaun Deeb, Hashtag King, Jungleman Cates, Hashtag King.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E01 | It's Been a While...
programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Bob Mather, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E02 | Shaun Deeb Is Not My Lover
programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Bob Mather, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 2 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E03 | Paging Rampage
programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Ethan "Rampage" Yau, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E04 | Don't Wanna Be Like Mike
programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Ethan "Rampage" Yau, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 4 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E05 | It Was Horrible Playing With All of You
programme.desc: $25/$50 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Mike Dentale, Joey DiPascale, Matt Glantz, Jonathan Little, Ethan "Rampage" Yau, and Shaun Deeb. (Part 5 of 5)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S09 E06 | High Stakes Brings All The Boys to the Yard
programme.desc: $100/$200 cash game action from Seminole Hard Rock, Hollywood, FL featuring Jeremy Ausmus, Jerry Wong, Shaun Deeb, Eric Wasserson, Philip Marsico, and Nolan King. (Part 1 of 1)

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E01 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 1 - It Begins
programme.desc: We collect the best poker streamers from Twitch.tv, as well as a few notable Vegas pros, to host our first ever Twitch Celebrity Cash Game. From a secret location in Las Vegas, NV we find out if the streamers can hang with the live players...or vise versa...featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E02 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 2 - Rampage
programme.desc: Our exclusive Twitch Celebrity Cash Game is in full swing, and the only thing more outrageous than the personalities is the pot sizes. From a private residence living room in Las Vegas, NV, this is cash game poker at its most entertaining. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E03 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 3 - The Kissing Bet
programme.desc: The Twitch Celebrity Cash Game in Las Vegas barrels on into the night as our curated collection of Twitch streamers and Vegas pros swap chips and insults. Featuring Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E04 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 4 - "Damn, Daniel!"
programme.desc: As word gets around Las Vegas that our cash game is in full swing, some notable players stop by and try and get in. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E05 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 5 - Psychic Flow
programme.desc: The poker from Las Vegas continues apace, and Phil Laak channels the psychic energy of the universal overmind to hone his poker play. Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E06 | Twitch Celebrity Cash Game | Part 6 - Aces On The Felt, Aces That Fly
programme.desc: After losing the biggest pot in Poker Night history, Antonio Esfandiari is slowing regaining ground. Can he continue to build his stack against the best online and live players in Vegas? Featuring Daniel Negreanu, Dan O'Brian, Phil Laak, Randy Lew, Jason Somerville, Antonio Esfandiari, Maria Ho, Jaime Staples, Scott Ball, and Bertrand Grosspellier

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E07 | Needle In Chip Stack
programme.desc: Settle in for a "friendly" game of poker in upstate New York with us as we visit Turning Stone Resort Casino. Featuring Mike Sigel, Dew Micali, Matt Glantz, Steve Ruddock, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E08 | Upstate Action
programme.desc: All it takes is a few All-Ins to put these pros on tilt. Find out who ends up getting felted, from our exclusive cash game at Turning Stone Resort Casino in Upstate New York. Featuring Mike Sigel, Dew Micali, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E09 | Awkward Silence...
programme.desc: Nothing brings the mood at the table down faster than a sore loser after a bad beat...which is EXACTLY what happens in this episode. The tension is thick at Turning Stone Resort Casino. Featuring Mike Sigel, Bart Hanson, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Jared Bleznick, Samantha Abernathy, Shaun Deeb, Joe McKeehen, and Mike Dentale

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E10 | Pillow Talk
programme.desc: Joe McKeehen and Tom Canulli square off at our table months ahead of their 2015 WSOP final table show down. Featuring Richard Anthony, Dominick Christiano, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Matt Glantz, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E11 | Turn and Burn
programme.desc: There are some hurt feelings after some big hands in this invite-only cash game from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E12 | Coach Fight
programme.desc: Two prominent poker coaches square off on our table from Turning Stone Resort Casino in Verona, NY. Featuring Richard Anthony, Rep Porter, Alec Torelli, Thomas Cannuli, Mike Dentale, Travell Thomas, Joe McKeehen, Shaun Deeb, and Bart Hanson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E13 | Shots, Shots, Shots
programme.desc: There is an alligator in the parking lot, and Hellmuth's luck runs out at Seminole Hard Rock Casino Resort in Hollywood, Florida. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samantha Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E14 | Hard Knocks At Hard Rock
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly tries to dig herself out of a hole. Featuring Jared Jaffee, Sorel Mizzi, Matt Glantz, Alec Torelli, Matt Affleck, Michael Sigel, Ben Tarzia, Jennifer Tilly, Samanta Abernathy, Dan O'Brien, and Phil Hellmuth

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S04 E15 | Upstuck
programme.desc: Laak and Hellmuth square off, and Jess Dawley shows us the breakfast of champions. Featuring Alec Torelli, Phil Laak, Asher Conniff, Josh Beckley, Abbey Daniels, Joe McKeehen, Phil Hellmuth, Jessica Dawley, Michael Laake, Esther Taylor-Brady, Blake Bohn

programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 4bis Freestyle Qingdao, China
programme.desc: Located in the Shandong province, along the Yellow Sea coast, Quindao is a modern metropolis with a dynamic vibe. This city is the chosen scenery for the third round of the 2019 UIM ABP season. In this episode, we will be focusing on the Runabout and Freestyle action of the Haier Grand Prix of Qingdao.Tune in for the best aquabike action!

programme.title: Under the Hull - Under the Hull
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 8 - Rolex Middle Sea Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Strapless In Sardinia
programme.desc: Chia is the home break to kitesurfing World Champion Airton Cozzolino. He has decided to invite seven of the world’s best riders to compete in the 1st ever strapless kitesurf event. The picturesque background of Sardinia, one of the most beautiful islands in the world, is the chosen scenery for this event.Over the next five days, kite surfers from around the world will travel to the southwest of this island to compete in a strapless, no feet attached to the board, competition. Judges will be scoring on freestyle, wave riding and different types of tricks to decide who will be the champion of this unique sport. Join us in Strapless in Sardinia and get an in-depth look at a historic event with highlights of action, interviews to the challenging athletes and loads of excitement.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: In this new episode of Maxiboat we travel to the Cannes Yachting Festival 2021 for a special show. We jump on board the new Beneteau Gran Trawler 62, discover the Outremer 55 sailing catamaran, the new 2022 outboards and notably the incredible V12 from the American Mercury. Also at the Yachting Festival, we will dive into the most beautiful new motorboats and yachts of the show: Riva 68 Diable, Azimut Grande Trideck, Azimut 53, Azimut 68, the Swan Shadow and the Med Yacht 42.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: In this episode 8 of Maxiboat, we dive into the world of ocean racing and the Ultimates category with these real F1 boats that distinguished themselves in the last Transat Jacques Vabre. Then we visit the Prestige Yachts in Vendée, France, to discover the X Line series and especially the brand new X60, a French motor-yacht in the era of time. Back to the Cannes Yachting Festival, we try out two brands in the spotlight: the Turkish shipyard Sirena Marine and its brand new Sirena 68 and then Zeelander, another high-end lobster brand from the Netherlands. Come on board with us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 4
programme.desc: Take part in a round the world yacht race. No sailing experience required, this is the Race of Your Life.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 3
programme.desc: Speed is the name of the game in this episode as we visit Dutch shipyard Heesen Yachts, renowned builder of record breaking, fast, lightweight aluminium superyachts. We talk to naval architects ‘Omega’ and we get an onboard look at the racing colour design of M/Y Aurelia, designed by Bannenberg & Rowell. Finally, no yacht would be complete without the latest technology and fastest onboard gadgets. We discover just what’s hot on a yacht with the most sought-after tech and AV firm, IdeaWorks.

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 3 - Durban
programme.desc: Welcome to Durban! The Surf Ski World Tour is reaching its end, and standing at the pinnacle of the sport, the best open ocean paddlers from around the worlds reunite to take part in it. Jasper Mocké has proved to be in shape all season, but we have seen other important names raise to the top. Discover the exciting world of surf ski on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 5 - Return
programme.desc: After nearly two months at sea, which now seems like lifetimes compounded by the suffering and challenge of the passage. The three are closing out their trip home and saving the best for last. Shocked by what seems to be death island, the three uncover shark hunters and in their last village before departure battle to resupply with the essentials of gas and water with the last pennies on the boat. Meanwhile the struggles of our filmmaker’s journey return along with the fear of going back to all that was left behind.

programme.title: 3 Days
programme.desc: Telegram: SkarlavaIn June 2015 something that changed the history of surfing took place in Nias. For three epic days on the 28th, 29th and 30th some of the heaviest barrels on the planet exploded onto the Indonesian reef. This has resulted in 3 days of surfing madness in Nias, Indonesia as the bravest world surfers dive into the water to battle and catch some of the biggest waves.Featuring world known surfers Luke Dillon, Dave Rastovich, Courtney Conlogue, Anthony Walsh, Damien Healey, Matt Bronley, Justin Bu'ulolo, Alex Bu'ulolo, Jim Burgin, Antoni Dachi, Skeet Durham, Philips, Matt Younis, Rodrigo Sino Leonardo Kessa and more...Don’t miss out on 3 days of pumping waves and heavy barrels that will mesmerise you on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode Lapo arrives in Capraia, a beautiful island in the Tuscan Archipelago. Rich with volcanic soil Capraia produces some excellent wines, and harvests some unique plants that make rich flavours. Lapo will discover the island with a world champion spier fisherman who uses sustainable fishing methods to serve at his five star restaurant. Will he impress the hardest critiques when they sample his dish or will he fail to impress? As usual he is still trying to win over his Captain.

programme.title: The Ocean Race - Leg 3 Itajai - HL
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Untouched Waters In Turkmenistan
programme.desc: Welcome to the eastern coast of the Caspian sea. Turkmenistan, Avasa, is known for its desert and not so much for its nautical resort. Nonetheless, Turkmenistan is hosting the PWA World Cup 2014 right here. Nautical Channel host Nikolai Berger explores the untouched waters of the Caspian Sea to discover the first time ever of the PWA Windsurfing World Cup. How will the best windsurfers in the world handle this challenging and unexplored location? Will Antoine Albeau’s brute force triumph again? Find out if the Caspian Sea can become one of the new exciting locations, with just the right wind conditions for this world class in Untouched Waters in Turkmenistan. Only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 7
programme.desc: The weather is not in the competitors favour during this week's episode of the Vendée Globe. The mood starts to drop due to the gray skies and after such a long time without contact. The competitors have now reached the Pacific Ocean, and just as they change oceans, there could also be a change in the development of the race.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 8
programme.desc: The athletes spend their Christmas in a very particular way: under a storm. This episode is filled with Christmas celebrations, and a very special guest makes its appearance: Santa Claus! The participants of this year's edition of the Vendée Globe continue through dangerous waters and had the luck of seeing whales. Incredible!

programme.desc: Welcome to the eastern coast of the Caspian sea. Turkmenistan, Avasa, is known for its desert and not so much for its nautical resort. Nonetheless, Turkmenistan is hosting the PWA World Cup 2014 right here. Nautical Channel host Nikolai Berger explores the untouched waters of the Caspian Sea to discover the first time ever of the PWA Windsurfing World Cup. How will the best windsurfers in the world handle this challenging and unexplored location? Will Antoine Albeau’s brute force triumph again? Find out if the Caspian Sea can become one of the new exciting locations, with just the right wind conditions for this world class in Untouched Waters in Turkmenistan. Only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 3
programme.desc: Speed is the name of the game in this episode as we visit Dutch shipyard Heesen Yachts, renowned builder of record breaking, fast, lightweight aluminium superyachts. We talk to naval architects ‘Omega’ and we get an onboard look at the racing colour design of M/Y Aurelia, designed by Bannenberg & Rowell. Finally, no yacht would be complete without the latest technology and fastest onboard gadgets. We discover just what’s hot on a yacht with the most sought-after tech and AV firm, IdeaWorks.

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 3 - Durban
programme.desc: Welcome to Durban! The Surf Ski World Tour is reaching its end, and standing at the pinnacle of the sport, the best open ocean paddlers from around the worlds reunite to take part in it. Jasper Mocké has proved to be in shape all season, but we have seen other important names raise to the top. Discover the exciting world of surf ski on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: In this new episode of Maxiboat we travel to the Cannes Yachting Festival 2021 for a special show. We jump on board the new Beneteau Gran Trawler 62, discover the Outremer 55 sailing catamaran, the new 2022 outboards and notably the incredible V12 from the American Mercury. Also at the Yachting Festival, we will dive into the most beautiful new motorboats and yachts of the show: Riva 68 Diable, Azimut Grande Trideck, Azimut 53, Azimut 68, the Swan Shadow and the Med Yacht 42.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: In this episode 8 of Maxiboat, we dive into the world of ocean racing and the Ultimates category with these real F1 boats that distinguished themselves in the last Transat Jacques Vabre. Then we visit the Prestige Yachts in Vendée, France, to discover the X Line series and especially the brand new X60, a French motor-yacht in the era of time. Back to the Cannes Yachting Festival, we try out two brands in the spotlight: the Turkish shipyard Sirena Marine and its brand new Sirena 68 and then Zeelander, another high-end lobster brand from the Netherlands. Come on board with us!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 8 - Rolex Middle Sea Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Strapless In Sardinia
programme.desc: Chia is the home break to kitesurfing World Champion Airton Cozzolino. He has decided to invite seven of the world’s best riders to compete in the 1st ever strapless kitesurf event. The picturesque background of Sardinia, one of the most beautiful islands in the world, is the chosen scenery for this event.Over the next five days, kite surfers from around the world will travel to the southwest of this island to compete in a strapless, no feet attached to the board, competition. Judges will be scoring on freestyle, wave riding and different types of tricks to decide who will be the champion of this unique sport. Join us in Strapless in Sardinia and get an in-depth look at a historic event with highlights of action, interviews to the challenging athletes and loads of excitement.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this year's season of Kite Maters we follow the life of Toni Vodisek, an athlete that has everything needed to become a star and win multiple titles. He has already won three World Series events in a row and found himself close to the podium spots at the end of the year. Also we talk with Guy Bridge: a Professional Kite foil rider that tells us what it takes to become one of the best.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: We follow one of the most recognizable figures in the kite family: Florian Gruber. We’ll hear the story from the man behind the successful transformation of kiteboarding; from a bevy of kiteboarders spending their free time casually competing, to an Olympic Sailing Class. We also dive into the equipment of kitesurf and how it has evolved over time.

programme.title: The Ocean Race - Leg 4 Newport - HL
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Wild Surf - Episode 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wild Surf - Episode 4
programme.desc: This week on Wild Surf the legendary surfer Garrett McNamara will glide in the water in Portugal, the place he is actually at now. We will learn more about this surfer that seems to be one with water to understand better his connection to the ocean and nature. Are you coming with us?

programme.title: IWWF World Waterski Championships - Ep1 - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 5bis Freestyle Sharjah, UAE
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the UAE for the traditional season-decider in Sharjah where the 2019 world championship will decide over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in all four categories: Ski Division GP1, Ski Ladies GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. In this episode, it is time for the Freestyle and Runabout GP1 categories to shine. Discover what will happen in the 2019 world championship!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 5bis Freestyle Sharjah, UAE
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the UAE for the traditional season-decider in Sharjah where the 2019 world championship will decide over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in all four categories: Ski Division GP1, Ski Ladies GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. In this episode, it is time for the Freestyle and Runabout GP1 categories to shine. Discover what will happen in the 2019 world championship!

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 3
programme.desc: Speed is the name of the game in this episode as we visit Dutch shipyard Heesen Yachts, renowned builder of record breaking, fast, lightweight aluminium superyachts. We talk to naval architects ‘Omega’ and we get an onboard look at the racing colour design of M/Y Aurelia, designed by Bannenberg & Rowell. Finally, no yacht would be complete without the latest technology and fastest onboard gadgets. We discover just what’s hot on a yacht with the most sought-after tech and AV firm, IdeaWorks.

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 3 - Durban
programme.desc: Welcome to Durban! The Surf Ski World Tour is reaching its end, and standing at the pinnacle of the sport, the best open ocean paddlers from around the worlds reunite to take part in it. Jasper Mocké has proved to be in shape all season, but we have seen other important names raise to the top. Discover the exciting world of surf ski on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 8 - Rolex Middle Sea Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Strapless In Sardinia
programme.desc: Chia is the home break to kitesurfing World Champion Airton Cozzolino. He has decided to invite seven of the world’s best riders to compete in the 1st ever strapless kitesurf event. The picturesque background of Sardinia, one of the most beautiful islands in the world, is the chosen scenery for this event.Over the next five days, kite surfers from around the world will travel to the southwest of this island to compete in a strapless, no feet attached to the board, competition. Judges will be scoring on freestyle, wave riding and different types of tricks to decide who will be the champion of this unique sport. Join us in Strapless in Sardinia and get an in-depth look at a historic event with highlights of action, interviews to the challenging athletes and loads of excitement.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: In this new episode of Maxiboat we travel to the Cannes Yachting Festival 2021 for a special show. We jump on board the new Beneteau Gran Trawler 62, discover the Outremer 55 sailing catamaran, the new 2022 outboards and notably the incredible V12 from the American Mercury. Also at the Yachting Festival, we will dive into the most beautiful new motorboats and yachts of the show: Riva 68 Diable, Azimut Grande Trideck, Azimut 53, Azimut 68, the Swan Shadow and the Med Yacht 42.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: In this episode 8 of Maxiboat, we dive into the world of ocean racing and the Ultimates category with these real F1 boats that distinguished themselves in the last Transat Jacques Vabre. Then we visit the Prestige Yachts in Vendée, France, to discover the X Line series and especially the brand new X60, a French motor-yacht in the era of time. Back to the Cannes Yachting Festival, we try out two brands in the spotlight: the Turkish shipyard Sirena Marine and its brand new Sirena 68 and then Zeelander, another high-end lobster brand from the Netherlands. Come on board with us!

In this episode, it is time for the Freestyle and Runabout GP1 categories to shine. Discover what will happen in the 2019 world championship!

programme.title: Vendée Globe Review
programme.desc: To date, the VENDÉE GLOBE is the only solo sailing race around the world that is non-stop and without assistance. The event followed in the wake of the Golden Globe that initiated the first circumnavigation of this type via the three capes (Good Hope, Leeuwin and Horn) in 1968.44,996 kilometres, or 24,296 miles. That is the circumference of the Earth. The Vendée Globe accomplishes in 74 days this planetary voyage as participants sail down the Atlantic, across the Indian and face the challenges of the Pacific Ocean. The public refer to this arduous competition as the Everest of the seas, and this 9th edition will see 33 contenders depart from Les Sables-d’ Olonne to take part in a life changing competition.In this year's edition, sailors had to overcome storms, take advantage of high winds and competition has never been this close at the end as three skippers that are just 60 miles apart rush to cross the finish line first.Who ended up getting proclaimed the champion of one of the hardest sailing races in the world? Find it out on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 4
programme.desc: Italians are known for their quality and style, and their superyachts are no different. Undoubtedly the largest and most famous of Italian builders is Perini Navi, makers of one of the most ecologically friendly superyachts in the world, the Maltese Falcon. We meet with designer Ken Frievokh and engineer Damon Roberts to understand the technology behind their ground-breaking dyna-rig onboard the Maltese Falcon.We then take a look at some of the finest Italian boats built by one of the fastest growing shipyards: Mondomarine. We get an all access introduction to Viareggio’s Sealyon, whose opulent and glamorous interiors were designed by Martin Kemp at Candy & Candy.

programme.title: Azores Windsurf Championship 2014
programme.desc: Formula Windsurfing Junior Youth & Masters European Championship - The Euro Cup 2014 was held in the stunningly beautiful Azores.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 2 World Cup Barnaul
programme.desc: Barnaul, in Russia is a city to the west of the Ob River. This is one of the major rivers in Russia and home to the second stage of the Sprint World Cup. Despite the cold windy morning, more than 3000 people have assisted to watch athletes give their all in this competition.Watch the competition at Barnaul that concluded with the 5K challenge.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: Markkleeberg, in Germany, is home to the Pleisse River that runs through the city. Known for merging several towns over the years, it now combines the best athletes who compete in the Slalom World Cup.Watch the most extreme canoe slalom that will decide the world champion in this unique 2021 Markkleeberg competition.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Chasing Jaguars
programme.desc: A group of brave kayakers get on a plane and fly all the way from Europe to Costa Rica looking for exciting adventures and fast rapids. In Chasing Jaguars, this group of friends will discover the nature and wildlife of the Costa Rican Whitewater paradise.This unforgettable kayak-experience in Costa Rica takes us to the middle of the jungle between snakes and wild animals as the group chase after jaguars in the wild depth of the tropical landscape. They will go against fast waters, challenge heat and cold waters and enjoy a trip of a lifetime.Join them in Chasing Jaguars, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 9 - Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Paddling across Borders
programme.desc: Our expedition begins in the Klopeinersee, a journey that leads us into two countries - Slovenia and Austria. We're going to meet people whom the cold, fog and snow in winter does not keep them away from spending every day at the water. The Klopeinersee has many opportunities to get active in the water. We will dive into a unique location in Europe, the 2125 metre-high Petzen mountain, to do watersports! Join Nautical Channel's hosts Lucia Metzbauer as she meets locals on both sides of the boarder who are crazy about their boats even in sub-zero temperatures, above and below the ground. We are going Paddling across Borders!

programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship has returned to the UAE for the traditional season-decider in Sharjah where the 2019 world championship will decide over three motos on Khalid Lagoon in all four categories: Ski Division GP1, Ski Ladies GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. In this episode, it is time for the Freestyle and Runabout GP1 categories to shine. Discover what will happen in the 2019 world championship!

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 9 - Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Second Life In Scandinavia
programme.desc: Hello from Sweden!We are on our way to the island of Orust. This island lives from boatbuilding, and big companies produce sailing boats here to expand their boats to the entire world. When the economic crisis stroke, demand decreased, thus less boats were ordered. This forced habitants of the small island of Orust to find a new path.Refit has become the new trend in Second Life in Scandinavia. Giving a new life to beautiful yachts, not only the economy is changing, but the local community as well. Lucia will venture into the island of Orust to learn more about the way its population has adapted and how it has become the mecca of boatbuilding.Watch out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik - Orebic
programme.desc: We begin our journey inside Sail-Ho at the most beautiful and magical old city: Dubrovnik. Home to many famous TV series due to its historical and beautiful landscape, we are ready to sail around the Elafiti islands and introduce you to the top quality wines of Pelješac peninsula.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 1: Dubrovnik, Mljet, Korčula
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 1
programme.desc: Andi is on a mission to discover the Tana River, Kenya’s longest river with a unique rapids system. In order to truly experience this region of the Tana, Andi has to learn to navigate the waters on a kayak. She tracks down river expert and professional Kayaker Kris Collyer and challenges him to learn his skill in three days. Andi is tested when she almost drowns trying to complete her mission.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi will discover the diverse marine ecosystem of Kilifi Creek. She will learn how to sail in three days in order to truly experience the creek. Andi goes 3 degrees south to meet Kevin, a local sailor who patiently teaches Andi the skills she needs in this short span of time. A true local experience is waiting if she can complete her training but failure is always lurking.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 4
programme.desc: Italians are known for their quality and style, and their superyachts are no different. Undoubtedly the largest and most famous of Italian builders is Perini Navi, makers of one of the most ecologically friendly superyachts in the world, the Maltese Falcon. We meet with designer Ken Frievokh and engineer Damon Roberts to understand the technology behind their ground-breaking dyna-rig onboard the Maltese Falcon.We then take a look at some of the finest Italian boats built by one of the fastest growing shipyards: Mondomarine. We get an all access introduction to Viareggio’s Sealyon, whose opulent and glamorous interiors were designed by Martin Kemp at Candy & Candy.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: XVIII Copa del Rey Vela Clásica - Episode 1 - Menorca
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 4
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 3
programme.desc: Lapo and his Captain are sailing to Pianosa, a very remote and exclusive Island. As it is a prison island, boats cannot come within a mile radius. This means Lapo is on a solo mission. Lapo will meet the prisoners who are keeping the island pristine but taking care of it’s natural fauna and flora. He will cook with ingredients from the prison garden and learn a secret dish from one of the wardens. Will this impress the Captain?

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 4
programme.desc: Lapo arrives on Giglio Island where he meets a local fisherman who supplies the restaurants with their seafood. On their trip out to sea, Lapo learns about species of the area and how to fish sustainably. He finds his catch when a bunch of girls who come from America come to dine on board. Now, its the right time to remember everything he learnt from the Maestros.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 9
programme.desc: Happy New Year! After all the events happening in 2020, we are all expecting incredible things happening in 2021. And what a better way to start the year but by being in the middle of the ocean, alone and fighting in one of the hardest sailing competitions ever seen? Competitors share with us what they wish in 2021 as they continue their journey in the Vendée Globe. Don't miss out!

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 10
programme.desc: Competitors have reached the South Atlantic and they enjoy the sunny weather of the summer in the Southern Hemisphere. But not everyone has gone this far. More than 5,000 nautical miles behind, a skipper is sailing across the Antipodes. Recovering the leaping distance will be tough, but can it be achieved? Find out what happens in this week's episode of the Vendée Globe on Nautical Channel.

We meet with designer Ken Frievokh and engineer Damon Roberts to understand the technology behind their ground-breaking dyna-rig onboard the Maltese Falcon.We then take a look at some of the finest Italian boats built by one of the fastest growing shipyards: Mondomarine. We get an all access introduction to Viareggio’s Sealyon, whose opulent and glamorous interiors were designed by Martin Kemp at Candy & Candy.

programme.title: Azores Windsurf Championship 2014
programme.desc: Formula Windsurfing Junior Youth & Masters European Championship - The Euro Cup 2014 was held in the stunningly beautiful Azores.

programme.title: Second Life In Scandinavia
programme.desc: Hello from Sweden!We are on our way to the island of Orust. This island lives from boatbuilding, and big companies produce sailing boats here to expand their boats to the entire world. When the economic crisis stroke, demand decreased, thus less boats were ordered. This forced habitants of the small island of Orust to find a new path.Refit has become the new trend in Second Life in Scandinavia. Giving a new life to beautiful yachts, not only the economy is changing, but the local community as well. Lucia will venture into the island of Orust to learn more about the way its population has adapted and how it has become the mecca of boatbuilding.Watch out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 6 Season Review
programme.desc: The 25th season of the UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship was another thrilling year as the best riders from all over the globe went head-to-head for the 2019 world title in four categories: Ski Ladies GP1, Ski Division GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. They raced in Europe, the Far East and Middle East over four rounds, including brand new venues and return visits to old favorites. Let's have a look back on the 2019 season!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

This island lives from boatbuilding, and big companies produce sailing boats here to expand their boats to the entire world. This forced habitants of the small island of Orust to find a new path.Refit has become the new trend in Second Life in Scandinavia. Giving a new life to beautiful yachts, not only the economy is changing, but the local community as well. Lucia will venture into the island of Orust to learn more about the way its population has adapted and how it has become the mecca of boatbuilding.Watch out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 6 Season Review
programme.desc: The 25th season of the UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship was another thrilling year as the best riders from all over the globe went head-to-head for the 2019 world title in four categories: Ski Ladies GP1, Ski Division GP1, Freestyle and Runabout GP1. They raced in Europe, the Far East and Middle East over four rounds, including brand new venues and return visits to old favorites. Let's have a look back on the 2019 season!

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: Eurosaf Championship Tavira
programme.desc: The EUROSAF (European Sailing Federation) Championship will take place in the waters off the Portuguese town of Tavira. The 19 sailing champions of Europe will be crowned in this gathering that has over 150 sailors and more than 100 boats and boards compete against triumph. 14 European countries have sent their best sailors to compete in eight different disciplines, including single-handed and double-handed dinghies, plus sailboards and high performance dinghy. They will compete over the 5-day competition to choose the youth champion of Europe in each of these disciplines. Follow the competition of the future talent of the sailing world as they sail across the waters of Tavira, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 5
programme.desc: Arguably, a superyacht is the most glamorous holiday you can take. Burgess yachts, the largest yacht broker in the world, talks to us about the process of owning and/or chartering your very own yacht.We take a look at just how yachts are marketed and meet with Australian Shipbuilders Silver Yachts, who achieved the amazing feat of getting a Mercedes car onto their Yacht Silver Fast for one of the most epic yachts commercials ever.For those wanting more than a charter, but don’t want to own a boat outright, we introduce them to MAHA Yachts, a brand new concept bridging the gap between Charter and Sales – a unique collaboration with the world leading hotelier Adrian Zecha from Aman Hotels and Feadship.We sign off with one last adventure underwater, exploring the sea with Deep Flight and Rainbow Fish, interviewing Dr. Xin Wu who is helping to pioneer deep water tourism.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: At 15 months out from the Tokyo 2020 Olympic regatta, the first major Olympic classes regatta this season in Europe, the 50th Trofeo Princesa Sofia Iberostar drew a record fleet to the Bay of Palma. For many countries, it was a key event for a selection. For others, an actual Olympic selection event. Let's dive in on this first episode of 2019 Sailing to Tokyo.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Prague
programme.desc: Prague hosts the 2021 Slalom World Cup, and the top class athletes are getting ready for a weekend full of action. They will have to pass through a combination of upstream and downstream gates in the fastest time possible, however the competition will prove to be hard as only the best will be in this event.Watch the Slalom World Cup competition that is taking place in Prague.

programme.title: Garrett McNamara & The Essence Of Big Wave
programme.desc: Garrett ‘GMAC’ McNamara is the American professional big wave surfer and extreme waterman known for breaking the world record for the largest wave ever surfed at Nazaré, Portugal. Surviving monstrous waves at Jaws, riding tsunamis from calving glaciers in Alaska and many more feats that are impossible to even imagine for many.Catch this exclusive half-hour special of Garrett McNamara & The Essence of Big Wave to understand his drive to get into the water despite knowing he’s risking his life. Find out more about his struggles, life-changing decisions, and the injuries that have made him become the legend he is today. From his earliest surfing days in Hawaii to world record success G-Mac tells it all.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 6
programme.desc: Take part in a round the world yacht race. No sailing experience required, this is the Race of Your Life.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 3
programme.desc: Our aspiring DJs are learning all there is in the music industry and they cannot get enough of it! They are ready to apply what they have been learning these days, but are also eager to get into the water and do some sailing. Let's meet some more international DJs to find out a bit more about their music style.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 4
programme.desc: The music scene in Ibiza is strong and passionate, and our aspiring deejays are grasping all the knowledge they can at the time they enjoy the day and night in the Spanish island. But, will this be enough to propel their career in the music industry forwards?Let's find out in this new episode of Sailing Deejay!

programme.title: One with Water
programme.desc: We are connected to the ocean, and if the ocean is not okay, we are not okay. This is the philosophy of free diving record holder Hanli Prinsloo. From a young age, she has been aware of the importance animals and nature have on us, so she has been going underwater to explore her body.Prinsloo is going to take us on a literal breath-taking journey underwater. She believes it is easier to hold our breath than what it is commonly believed, and the underwater world takes us on a new journey of wilderness undiscovered for many. Get ready to dive with her and US Olympic swimmer Peter Marshal in One with Water, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: RKJ Sailing Legend
programme.desc: Born in Putney, London, Sir William Robert Patrick Knox-Johnston served in the Merchant Navy, where he acquired his skills to later on become a British legend and be awarded the title of Sir.RKJ Sailing Legend is a 56-minute documentary about possibly the most famous sailor in modern times, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston. RKJ was the first man to sail non-stop and alone around the world back in 1969: Now on the 50th anniversary of his achievement, we want to rememorate his feat.Get on board RKJ Sailing Legend, the remarkable story of Knox-Johnston's voyage around the world and into history. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 3
programme.desc: We venture into Kenya’s wild coastline in the Watamu region. This Marine reserve is incredibly unique and in order for Andi to truly experience it she has to learn to kite surf in a very short period of time. She needs help, so she decides to track down the Tribe Watersports and Ben Kelliher who will guide her through a crash course in kitesurfing. If she can do it in the allocated time, Ben has an incredible prize waiting for her.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Barbados
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Barbados while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Barbados: an eastern Caribbean island with colonial buildings, botanical gardens and 17th century plantation houses. Join Sam Bleakly, a travel writer, surfer, and a lecturer in cultural tourism, as he takes you under the skin of the coastline and inner parts of Barbados.

But, will this be enough to propel their career in the music industry forwards?Let's find out in this new episode of Sailing Deejay!

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Split – Trogir
programme.desc: It is time to explore the wonders of Split, city of the monumental Diocletian's Palace. In this occasion, we will introduce you to the region's beautiful marinas, show you the fastest way of traveling within Croatia and explore the spots you should not miss out.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Rogoznica – Primosten
programme.desc: Today we are taking you to the hidden gems of the Croatian coast. Places of mesmerising beauty but known by few. We are talking about Rogoznica and Primošten! We'll explore the Kornati islands, the destination that amazed the famous writer George Bernard Shaw and much more.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi is back in the Watamu Marine Reserve but this time on a new mission: save the endangered sea turtles. She spends three days at the Local Ocean Trust with Marine Biologist Casper van de Geer. If Andi can learn the importance of sea turtles in the marine ecosystem and the vital skills needed to protect them, she might have the opportunity to release a turtle back into the wild.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 5
programme.desc: Arguably, a superyacht is the most glamorous holiday you can take. Burgess yachts, the largest yacht broker in the world, talks to us about the process of owning and/or chartering your very own yacht.We take a look at just how yachts are marketed and meet with Australian Shipbuilders Silver Yachts, who achieved the amazing feat of getting a Mercedes car onto their Yacht Silver Fast for one of the most epic yachts commercials ever.For those wanting more than a charter, but don’t want to own a boat outright, we introduce them to MAHA Yachts, a brand new concept bridging the gap between Charter and Sales – a unique collaboration with the world leading hotelier Adrian Zecha from Aman Hotels and Feadship.We sign off with one last adventure underwater, exploring the sea with Deep Flight and Rainbow Fish, interviewing Dr. Xin Wu who is helping to pioneer deep water tourism.

For many countries, it was a key event for a selection. For others, an actual Olympic selection event. Let's dive in on this first episode of 2019 Sailing to Tokyo.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 5
programme.desc: Lapo is back on land for the Surf and Turf Season finale. He will be meeting the Tuscan Cowboys to learn about Tuscany’s beef industry as well as taking to the waters with a local fisherman to fish for sea urchins. On this final episode, Lapo is ready to give his all and prove himself worthy of his captain's approval. Will the Captain finally soften to Lapo?

programme.title: Up the Creek
programme.desc: There's only one boat race in the world where two-man teams blast up southern Australia's Murray River in aluminium dinghies at speeds of over 80kph. This river is not only known for dividing Victoria from New South Wales and for being Australia’s longest river, but also for being full of dangerous obstacles.Up the Creek challenges competing teams to speed up Murray River’s challenging water in a competition like no other. Find out now what will happen in this competition that explores Australia’s nature in depth, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 11
programme.desc: Skippers have made their way up South America and are getting ready to push to the end in the Vendée Globe. Soon, they will cross the Equator and get back on the Northern Hemisphere, and that is good news for all. One of the boats had to return to his home port, so the lead of the Vendée Globe has changed.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 12
programme.desc: Finally. The last week of the Vendée Globe is here. Just five days from home, the Vendée Globe prepares the most unpredictable outcome in history. Three boats within 60 miles of each other, 3 sailors with hunger for victory and one destination: Sables d'Olonne. The final stretch promises to be thrilling and full of uncertainty.

Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2016
programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shifting Ice + Changing Tides
programme.desc: In March 2014 six women set sail from Iceland with the intention of sailing across the Denmark Strait and up the west coast of Greenland. Shifting Ice and Changing Tides' is a unique human and wind powered, female led, ski and sail expedition that is captivating for the beauty of its white, gelid landscape.In this remote, fascinating and beautiful region, six women will explore and ski first descents while limiting their environmental footprint by sailing and climbing. The expedition will serve as a platform for raising awareness about climate change and environmental issues as well as for inspiring and promoting female participation in snow sports adventures.Join them as they adventure in the wilderness to collect scientific data in one of the most incredible and deathly climates. This is their story.

programme.title: Wind and Waves Gran Canaria
programme.desc: Welcome to Gran Canaria! This island in the Canary Islands is roughly 100 kilometres away from Morocco despite belonging to Spain, and the mix of cultures is palpable in the whole archipelago as visitors from all over the world come to enjoy its subtropical climate and optimal conditions for nautical sports.In this occasion, Lucia Metzbauer lands in Gran Canaria, host of the PWA World Championships. The high speed winds from Pozo Izquierdo drives the attention of athletes, so get ready to find out why this destination is one of the most attractive for windsurfing aficionados from around the world.Get on board in Wind and Waves Gran Canaria, a new adventure on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 5
programme.desc: Arguably, a superyacht is the most glamorous holiday you can take. Burgess yachts, the largest yacht broker in the world, talks to us about the process of owning and/or chartering your very own yacht.We take a look at just how yachts are marketed and meet with Australian Shipbuilders Silver Yachts, who achieved the amazing feat of getting a Mercedes car onto their Yacht Silver Fast for one of the most epic yachts commercials ever.For those wanting more than a charter, but don’t want to own a boat outright, we introduce them to MAHA Yachts, a brand new concept bridging the gap between Charter and Sales – a unique collaboration with the world leading hotelier Adrian Zecha from Aman Hotels and Feadship.We sign off with one last adventure underwater, exploring the sea with Deep Flight and Rainbow Fish, interviewing Dr. Xin Wu who is helping to pioneer deep water tourism.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: At 15 months out from the Tokyo 2020 Olympic regatta, the first major Olympic classes regatta this season in Europe, the 50th Trofeo Princesa Sofia Iberostar drew a record fleet to the Bay of Palma. For many countries, it was a key event for a selection. For others, an actual Olympic selection event. Let's dive in on this first episode of 2019 Sailing to Tokyo.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shifting Ice + Changing Tides
programme.desc: In March 2014 six women set sail from Iceland with the intention of sailing across the Denmark Strait and up the west coast of Greenland. Shifting Ice and Changing Tides' is a unique human and wind powered, female led, ski and sail expedition that is captivating for the beauty of its white, gelid landscape.In this remote, fascinating and beautiful region, six women will explore and ski first descents while limiting their environmental footprint by sailing and climbing. The expedition will serve as a platform for raising awareness about climate change and environmental issues as well as for inspiring and promoting female participation in snow sports adventures.Join them as they adventure in the wilderness to collect scientific data in one of the most incredible and deathly climates. This is their story.
