programme.title: RKJ Sailing Legend
programme.desc: Born in Putney, London, Sir William Robert Patrick Knox-Johnston served in the Merchant Navy, where he acquired his skills to later on become a British legend and be awarded the title of Sir.RKJ Sailing Legend is a 56-minute documentary about possibly the most famous sailor in modern times, Sir Robin Knox-Johnston. RKJ was the first man to sail non-stop and alone around the world back in 1969: Now on the 50th anniversary of his achievement, we want to rememorate his feat.Get on board RKJ Sailing Legend, the remarkable story of Knox-Johnston's voyage around the world and into history. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2016
programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Our aspiring DJs are learning all there is in the music industry and they cannot get enough of it! Let's meet some more international DJs to find out a bit more about their music style.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 1
programme.desc: Jamie has been living at Pipeline since he was four/five years old. He believes this place he grew up in shaped him into becoming a surfer, and he loves surfing and learning new tricks. He is not the type of guy that tries to hand out with the best surfers in the world. He is who he is and he's ready to show us where he lives, where he surfs and who his friends are.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Who is J.O.B Jamie throws down an epic free surf session at Pipeline, where he works on his board transfers. Then, he meets up with Alvert, a North Shore local who resides at the iconic surf spot and is considered by many as eccentric.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: FUN FOIL FEST - España Mar Menor - Los Alcázares
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.1 - Rolex China Sea Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: World Kiteboarding League - Episode 1 - Akyaka
programme.desc: The World Kiteboarding Championships Freestyle Tour are headed to stunning Akyaka, in Turkey, for the WKC Akyaka World Cup that kicks off the 2018 WKC season. The world's top elite league freestyle riders will battle it out in one of the world's premier kiteboarding locations. As one of the most scenic and unspoilt corners of the Mediterranean, Akyaka will see athletes give their all for the first win of the season. Enjoy the best moments of the competition, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: World Kiteboarding League - Episode 2 - Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to Dakhla, Morocco, for the second round of the World Kiteboarding Championships Tour. The warm-up is over as the world's top freestyle kiteboarding talent kick it up a notch in their quest for the 2018 World Title. It's the usual mix of seasoned former world champions and veterans vs some incredible up and coming talent that has been pushing the limits of kiteboarding to new impressive heights. Are you going to miss out?

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shifting Ice + Changing Tides
programme.desc: In March 2014 six women set sail from Iceland with the intention of sailing across the Denmark Strait and up the west coast of Greenland. Shifting Ice and Changing Tides' is a unique human and wind powered, female led, ski and sail expedition that is captivating for the beauty of its white, gelid landscape.In this remote, fascinating and beautiful region, six women will explore and ski first descents while limiting their environmental footprint by sailing and climbing. The expedition will serve as a platform for raising awareness about climate change and environmental issues as well as for inspiring and promoting female participation in snow sports adventures.Join them as they adventure in the wilderness to collect scientific data in one of the most incredible and deathly climates. This is their story.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2016
programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Take part in a round the world yacht race. No sailing experience required, this is the Race of Your Life.

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep3
programme.desc: We invite you to discover and remember the best moments in "A day at the Barcelona International Boat Show".During the 4 days of the exhibition, you can discover more than 275 international exhibitors and almost 700 boats on the water, and many more boats at the show.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Sibenik – Vodice
programme.desc: We will visit the beautiful historical city of Šibenik, explore fascinating Šibenik channel and the Krka river, learn a bit about unique coral handmade jewelry, visit a very interesting museum on the island of Prvić and much more!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Biograd – Ugljan
programme.desc: We have arrived at the heart of the Croatian coast, the royal town of Biograd and the island Ugljan known for top quality olive and fish products. We are going to visit the beautiful Crvena Luka resort, the indescribably pretty Telašćica nature park and reveal one little island lost in time.

programme.title: Wind Masters - Episode 3: Split, Makarska
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi arrives to the ancient Arabic town of Lamu. She is about to discover what dhow culture means to the people of Kenya. She spends three days with the incredible Ali Lamu, dhow builder and carpenter who is trying to save the lost art of dhow building. A unique experience will reveal many secrets of the location and this traditional work that is getting lost amongst younger people.

programme.title: Mr. Price Pro Ballito
programme.desc: Follow the world leaders of surfing as they come to South Africa, Willard beach Ballito. 96 competitors from 18 countries will surf for the 250,000$ prize. Also, music concerts filled with South African bands will be cheering the best surfers of the world with their jamming.

This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Nikolaos is giving us a well-needed cooking lesson before jumping on board to prepare the recipe he has in store for us. He will also take the time to teach us how to find out whether if a fish is fresh or not before we go on and try the dish with the people from the port. Then, we are meeting with the young Chef Jason, who with only 19 years is the main chef at a 4-star hotel. He is cooking on board our boat, and we are excited to try out his dish.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Shifting Ice + Changing Tides
programme.desc: In March 2014 six women set sail from Iceland with the intention of sailing across the Denmark Strait and up the west coast of Greenland. Shifting Ice and Changing Tides' is a unique human and wind powered, female led, ski and sail expedition that is captivating for the beauty of its white, gelid landscape.In this remote, fascinating and beautiful region, six women will explore and ski first descents while limiting their environmental footprint by sailing and climbing. The expedition will serve as a platform for raising awareness about climate change and environmental issues as well as for inspiring and promoting female participation in snow sports adventures.Join them as they adventure in the wilderness to collect scientific data in one of the most incredible and deathly climates. This is their story.

programme.title: Sickline Kayaking - Episode 1
programme.desc: This sixth edition of the Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship is ready for the action. Watch how the Super Final fills up with great lines, huge mistakes and performances worth watching over and over. Joe Morley is about to run a perfect execution to dethrown the 3 times world champion Sam Sutton. Will we see more surprises during the event? Find out in the 2013 Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2017
programme.desc: Thanks to the famed Atlantic swells that roll along its coastline and despite being home to just 650 people, this watersports mecca attracts surfers and windsurfers from across the world. Tiree's wild coastline is battered by some of the UK's highest wind ratings, creating the perfect meteorological conditions to host the longest running windsurfing event in the world - the Tiree Wave Classic. It is time for the 2017 edition. Come join us!

programme.title: Inside Kiel - Sailing Capital and more
programme.desc: Kiel is the nautical epicentre of Germany, and the proud host of the world's biggest sailing event, the Kieler Woche. From learning how to sail a Formula18 catamaran to exploring local kitesurf spots and shipyards, Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer will be there, diving into the local nautical scene and finding out why there are so many young sailors in Kiel.Join her in Kieler Woche, one of the largest sailing events in the world. With regattas sailing at the highest level and an unbeatable class diversity, entertainment is secured as we learn everything about this German event that drives the attention of sailors worldwide.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2017
programme.desc: Thanks to the famed Atlantic swells that roll along its coastline and despite being home to just 650 people, this watersports mecca attracts surfers and windsurfers from across the world. Tiree's wild coastline is battered by some of the UK's highest wind ratings, creating the perfect meteorological conditions to host the longest running windsurfing event in the world - the Tiree Wave Classic. It is time for the 2017 edition. Come join us!

programme.title: Inside Kiel - Sailing Capital and more
programme.desc: Kiel is the nautical epicentre of Germany, and the proud host of the world's biggest sailing event, the Kieler Woche. From learning how to sail a Formula18 catamaran to exploring local kitesurf spots and shipyards, Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer will be there, diving into the local nautical scene and finding out why there are so many young sailors in Kiel.Join her in Kieler Woche, one of the largest sailing events in the world. With regattas sailing at the highest level and an unbeatable class diversity, entertainment is secured as we learn everything about this German event that drives the attention of sailors worldwide.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: The 2017 edition of the FNB Dusi Canoe Marathon, raced over three days from Pietermaritzburg to Durban on the East Coast of South Africa is always tough paddling and portaging. With the country in the grips of the two year long drought, it became a whole lot tougher. Low rivers and searing hot weather, and the final stage raced on an empty river! Discover the best moments of the 65th Dusi Canoe Marathon.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 6
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Inside Superyachts we interview Ken Freivokh, designer of some of the world’s most iconic yachts and concepts ever. Besides talking to the genius behind some of the best yacht masterpieces we meet with Thirty C leading CGI concept designers.Lastly, we know that no yacht would be complete without a vessel to get you to and from shore. Pascoe Tenders open their doors to us to have a look inside these space-aged, hyperluxurious tenders.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we move to Great Britain and the Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy to follow the Volvo 49er, 49erFX and Nacra 17 European Championship. This will be the first Olympic class racing event to take place in the UK since 2016! Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 3
programme.desc: Jamie gets ready for the big swells that are about to hit the North Shore by dusting off his big wave board. While others go to a top surf spot in Maui, Jamie reflects on staying closer to home and continues to master the switch stance.

programme.title: Who is J.O.B - Episode 4
programme.desc: It is December on the North Shore and the waves are pumping. Jamie will catch some of the best winter waves before meeting Jacob from the Make a Wish Foundation to take him surfing and diving with sharks. Then, Jamie earns a wild card spot at the Sunset Pro, a SUP competition and a stop on the Stand Up World Tour.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Palma de Mallorca
programme.desc: Welcome to the 51st Trofeo Princesa Sofía regatta in Palma de Mallorca! More than a thousand of accomplished sailing athletes compete in the first Hempel World Cup Series regatta of the new Olympic cycle. As the start of the European racing season, a great sense of urgency and enthusiasm can be felt among competitors, and as a vital event, we are eager to see how their training has gone over the winter.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Rolex World Sailing Awards - Episode 1
programme.desc: 2021 has marked a great year in the nautical world. With the Olympics, America's Cup and Vendee Globe, it is great sailing is back and strong. Let's look back on the past year and find out who of this year's nominees will become World Sailor of the Year as well as what sustainable project has been received the World Sailing 11th Hour Racing Sustainability Award.

programme.title: World Kiteboarding League - Episode 3 - Brazil
programme.desc: It's the final showdown of the season, the culmination of a year of preparation, training, agony, joy, heartbreak and jubilation. This is the ultimate fight where the 2018 World Kiteboarding Championships will be decided and the men's and women's WKC World Champions will be crowned at the Superkite Brazil in Cumbuco. Are you ready for the action?

programme.title: World Kiteboarding League - Episode 4 - Season Review
programme.desc: It has been a spectacular season for the World Kiteboarding Championships, as the WKC brought together the best freestyle kiteboarders in the world, competing in three stunning locations to decide who would be the WKC world champion for 2018. Every single venue was a prime kiteboarding location renowned for its reliable thermal winds and water conditions. Let's relive the best moments of the season!

Besides talking to the genius behind some of the best yacht masterpieces we meet with Thirty C leading CGI concept designers.Lastly, we know that no yacht would be complete without a vessel to get you to and from shore. Pascoe Tenders open their doors to us to have a look inside these space-aged, hyperluxurious tenders.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we move to Great Britain and the Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy to follow the Volvo 49er, 49erFX and Nacra 17 European Championship. This will be the first Olympic class racing event to take place in the UK since 2016! Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Zadar – Nin
programme.desc: Today we will be exploring the historical city of Zadar, its numerous attractions and some very special secrets. You will also discover with us the biggest marina in Croatia and the amazing old city of Nin.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8 - Pag – Rab
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the magnificent islands of Pag and Rab and enjoy wonderful local gastronomy. Did you know that word salary originates from the latin word salarium which means salt? In Roman times, soldiers got their pay in salt!

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Simon's Town, the neighbour port down here in Cape Town. Today on Ocean Safari we are meeting up with Roger Hudson and Asenathi Jim. This is the perfect representation of what the rainbow nation stands for. We will hear the story of these two individuals from completely different backgrounds join together to form a union and represent South Africa at the London Olympic Games. Let's find out more now on this first episode of Ocean Safari: South Africa!

programme.title: Ocean Safari - South Africa - Episode 2
programme.desc: South Africa is home to some of the world's most legendary surfers. In this episode, Andi goes to Cape Town to catch Jordy Smith before the next leg of the ASP Tour. In Durban Andi meets with Bianca Buitendag, to find out how winning 6 star ASP events has changed her life. Then she spends time with the legendary artisan behind the sport: Spider Murphey.

programme.title: What the Sea Gives me
programme.desc: What The Sea Gives Me is a feature length documentary comprised of intimate & candid interviews with some of the ocean’s most extraordinary ambassadors including Great White shark researcher Brett McBride, artist Matt Beard, photographer Chris Burkard, bodysurfer Angie Oschmann, conservationist Jean-Michelle Cousteau, free-diver Herbert Nitsch. We give you an honest and personal look through the eyes of those who thrive under the most extreme water conditions, those ensuring the proper care of the oceans for future generations and those who simply derive a sense of pure joy from the sea.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters - Episode 7
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Moana Waiwai
programme.desc: Moana Waiwai follows the Free Swim journey of wahine (woman) Ally Davey as she takes on 70km of open ocean around the stunning Coromandel coastline to bring awareness to the protection of New Zealand’s oceans.For over three days it does more than encapsulate stunning panoramas on the extraordinary scenario of New Zealand. It is also inspiring for people as we become aware of the natural beauty of the ocean so we can protect it before it is too late.This is an inspirational film, not an activist propaganda, that highlights exploration and the intrinsic benefits of getting wet and looking below the surface. In Moana Waiwai Ally Davey will champion endurance of her human spirit in this seemingly impossible task to achieve a higher goal: protection of the oceans.Be part of her adventure on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: For this year's tour, the 41st edition, we are guaranteed a frenetic rush along the French coastline. 17 days of action and non-stop thrills and spills that will sail from Durkirk to Nice. Professional sailors, amateurs and students get ready to give their all and hopefully win the precious Tour de France à Voile. Enjoy the best moments of the 2018 edition of the Tour, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2017
programme.desc: Thanks to the famed Atlantic swells that roll along its coastline and despite being home to just 650 people, this watersports mecca attracts surfers and windsurfers from across the world. Tiree's wild coastline is battered by some of the UK's highest wind ratings, creating the perfect meteorological conditions to host the longest running windsurfing event in the world - the Tiree Wave Classic. It is time for the 2017 edition. Come join us!

programme.title: Inside Kiel - Sailing Capital and more
programme.desc: Kiel is the nautical epicentre of Germany, and the proud host of the world's biggest sailing event, the Kieler Woche. From learning how to sail a Formula18 catamaran to exploring local kitesurf spots and shipyards, Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer will be there, diving into the local nautical scene and finding out why there are so many young sailors in Kiel.Join her in Kieler Woche, one of the largest sailing events in the world. With regattas sailing at the highest level and an unbeatable class diversity, entertainment is secured as we learn everything about this German event that drives the attention of sailors worldwide.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 6
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Inside Superyachts we interview Ken Freivokh, designer of some of the world’s most iconic yachts and concepts ever. Besides talking to the genius behind some of the best yacht masterpieces we meet with Thirty C leading CGI concept designers.Lastly, we know that no yacht would be complete without a vessel to get you to and from shore. Pascoe Tenders open their doors to us to have a look inside these space-aged, hyperluxurious tenders.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we move to Great Britain and the Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy to follow the Volvo 49er, 49erFX and Nacra 17 European Championship. This will be the first Olympic class racing event to take place in the UK since 2016! Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2018
programme.desc: In its 32nd year, the event continues to showcase the best, most extreme, windsurfing seen in competition. Attracting some of the best riders in the world to make the pilgrimage to the small island located in the inner Hebrides off the Northwest coast of Scotland, this is one of the four events taht make up this year's British Wave Sailing Tour Championship. Enjoy the Tiree Wave Classic from 2018, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Skeleton Sea
programme.desc: João and Xandi, two surfers in their early 50′s, have been working together for 25 years. They clean beaches and with the trash they pick they create the most stunning artwork. However, living as an artist and idealist in Portugal is not economically profitable and, therefore, not easy.Their family life is affected by the choices they make and their wish to raise awareness about the ever-growing pollution in our oceans. Skeleton Sea takes us on their personal journey to help people understand the importance of our oceans to help us take the step to change our habits to keep them clean. As all live comes from the sea, Skeleton Sea reminds us that this powerful force has the ability of taking it away from us as well.

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Winter Kiting In St Moritz
programme.desc: The ice cold winter of Switzerland, wind, a board and a kite! Welcome to the adventure of winter kiting! Join us as we visit the oldest snowkiting school in the world and admire the action the snowkiting legends put up. All of this on the immense frozen Silvaplana Lake in the middle of the highest peaks of the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: OFQUI
programme.desc: The Isthmus of Ofqui, unknown for many and chosen as surf destination by few adventurers.The stretch of land that separates the Pacific Ocean's inland seas, is the only way to make it if you want to surf the shores of Golfo de Penas. Connecting the Taitao Peninsula with the Chilean mainland, Ofqui offers world class waves. This thaw surf film approaches the vast territory of the Patagonia in different ways, this time, centered around Ofqui.Pro surfers will face ice-cold waters in their expedition to surf deathly waves in Ofqui, one of the most unknown locations of the Patagonia and with a microclimate that maximises the upcoming waves.Join them in their adventure to Ofqui here, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: When a young actress (Janet Gaynor) arrives in Hollywood with hopes of stardom, a chance encounter places her under the wing of older actor Norman Maine (Fredric March). Adopting the stage name Vicki Lester, she co-stars with Norman in a major motion picture, but his success is clearly fading even as her career begins. After the couple wed, Vicki's fame continues to grow, but Norman descends into alcoholism, and she must decide between pursuing her dream and caring for him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour A Mystical World
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Second Coming
programme.desc: A tight family unit navigating their way through family life as it breaks down in the aftermath of an unexplained pregnancy.

programme.title: Pretty Ugly People
programme.desc: A woman summons her best friends from college into the wilderness for a four-day camping trip, and everyone quickly discovers that they haven't exactly been told the whole truth about why she's scheduled the outing.

programme.title: A Year and Change
programme.desc: After falling off the roof at a New Year's Eve house party, Owen decides that it's time to make some wholesale changes in his life. He quits drinking, re-enters his estranged son's life, re ignites old friendships, and falls in love with Vera.

programme.title: For Your Height Only
programme.desc: A diminutive secret agent (Weng Wang) uses his skills with guns and gun molls to rescue a kidnapped scientist.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour Down Under The Wild West of Cooking
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cooks Tour One Night in Bangkok
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Slipstream
programme.desc: In a futuristic world savaged by the slipstream wind, bounty hunter Matt snatches a murderer with a price of his head from lawman Will Tasker.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Adventures of Power
programme.desc: A mineworker and dreamer - Power - must overcome obstacles and ridicule to become the world's greatest air-drummer.

programme.title: Dial M For Murder
programme.desc: Ex-tennis pro Tony Wendice (Ray Milland) wants to have his wealthy wife, Margot (Grace Kelly), murdered so he can get his hands on her inheritance. When he discovers her affair with Mark Halliday (Robert Cummings), he comes up with the perfect plan to kill her.

programme.title: The Lightkeepers
programme.desc: A grumpy sailor (Richard Dreyfuss) and a young stranger (Tom Wisdom) change their negative opinions about women when two move nearby.

programme.title: Check Point
programme.desc: A vagrant discovers plans for an invasion in America and notifies the local sheriff about the plot. When the sheriff notices odd things happening after dismissing the claims, he begins to investigate the existence of a sleeper cell in the small town.

programme.title: Arcadia
programme.desc: A man (John Hawkes) takes his children on a cross-country move to California and tries to hide the truth about their mother's absence.

programme.title: Numb
programme.desc: A couple in financial distress find GPS coordinates that supposedly lead to a fortune in stolen gold. Desperate for the money, they team up with two hitchhikers to enter a remote winter wilderness to recover the loot.

programme.title: The Horrible House on the Hill
programme.desc: Five extremely disturbed, sociopathic children escape from their psychiatric transport and are taken in unwittingly by a group of adult villagers on winter vacation.

programme.title: Phenomena
programme.desc: An American (Jennifer Connelly) at a Swiss finishing school calls on insects to help a paralyzed scientist (Donald Pleasence) fight a monster.

programme.title: 2B Perfectly Honest
programme.desc: Two men (Adam Trese, Andrew McCarthy) have different ways of coping with the untimely failure of their Internet business.

programme.title: Alien Trespass
programme.desc: A spaceship crash in 1957 California leads to the escape of the Ghota, a murderous monster bent on destroying all life forms. In order to capture the Ghota, a benevolent alien named Urp takes over the body of an astronomer (Eric McCormack) and enlists the aid of a waitress named Tammy (Jenni Baird). But, unless Urp and Tammy are successful, mankind is doomed.

programme.title: Lovesick Fool
programme.desc: A single man in Los Angeles navigates the complicated world of relationships and dating.

programme.title: The Perfect Family
programme.desc: A devout parishioner (Kathleen Turner) goes to extremes when she becomes obsessed with winning the coveted title of Catholic Woman of the Year.

programme.title: Blinder
programme.desc: An ex footballer embroiled in a scandal returns home to clear his name and reignite an old flame.

programme.title: 1st Strike
programme.desc: Juan, a teenager from a gang-controlled neighborhood, is falsely accused of a crime. His uncle, a former gang leader-- now an actor -- is killed trying to help him, and his sister turns to Alan, a war-weary defense attorney, to help him avoid prison.

programme.title: Meet Bill
programme.desc: A mild-mannered bank executive (Aaron Eckhart) mentors a teenage con artist and tries to make a career change as a doughnut merchant.

programme.title: Slip and Fall
programme.desc: Danny has to come up with a way to pay for law school and rent.

programme.title: Ass Backwards
programme.desc: Mishaps and calamities befall two best friends (June Diane Raphael, Casey Wilson) who are on their way back to their hometown for a children's beauty-pageant reunion.

programme.title: The Trouble With Bliss
programme.desc: An emotionally inert 35-year-old (Michael C. Hall) finds his life opening up when he begins a relationship with a former classmate's 18-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Oxy Morons
programme.desc: Jason and Danny are forever haunted by the murder of their bank robber father, which left their family desolate. When the boys' mother comes home with a new prescription painkiller, the two are introduced to a tiny life-changing pill.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Emotions
programme.desc: Welcome to Meditations for Manifesting, how to bring yourself back into alignment with the greater good and pray from a place of wholeness and true faith. Episode one is all about the emotions. Begin with breath awareness, establishing a calm and steady mind. Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Light the Fire – Downward Dog
programme.desc: If you're feeling not so flexible, this course is where you should be! This class is focused on understanding shoulder mobility in the fundamental yoga asana called downdog,

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Potion Apoptogenic Golden Mylk
programme.desc: Golden milk is a turmeric based Ayurvedic potion that has numerous benefits for both your mind and your body. Enjoy this tea any time of day and start to notice the difference in how you feel. Less than 10 minutes.

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Creamy Butternut Squash Tomato Soup with Grilled "Cheese"
programme.desc: It’s everyone’s favorite combo – creamy tomato soup and a grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for one of her favorite daily yoga drills, plank! Kino takes you through a quick warm up before diving into the challenging world of plank pose. Get ready to tone your core and strengthen your shoulders!

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Bali
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Ashtanga Yoga Sadhana with David Robson
programme.desc: Join Kino for a conversation with David Robson!

programme.title: Lemon Poppy Seed Loaf
programme.desc: What’s for dessert? How about this lemon poppy seed loaf?

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Ready to take your veganism to the next level? This episode of Kino’s Closet is all about Makeup! Tune in as Kino tries a new brand of vegan makeup with help from her makeup artist, Nanda Quero. In this episode, you’ll find out, not only why it’s important to choose ethically sourced brands, but also whether or not Kino gives this brand a thumbs up.

programme.title: Parsvakonasana
programme.desc: Join Kino for a chair yoga class that builds up to Parsvakonasana, the extended side angle pose.

programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Morning Routine
programme.desc: One of Mark’s favorite morning routines, this is a slow-moving practice featuring static holds.

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Ashtanga Yoga Sadhana with David Robson
programme.desc: Join Kino for a conversation with David Robson!

programme.title: Lemon Poppy Seed Loaf
programme.desc: What’s for dessert? How about this lemon poppy seed loaf?

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Ready to take your veganism to the next level? This episode of Kino’s Closet is all about Makeup! Tune in as Kino tries a new brand of vegan makeup with help from her makeup artist, Nanda Quero. In this episode, you’ll find out, not only why it’s important to choose ethically sourced brands, but also whether or not Kino gives this brand a thumbs up.

programme.title: Parsvakonasana
programme.desc: Join Kino for a chair yoga class that builds up to Parsvakonasana, the extended side angle pose.

programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer Budapest
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Budapest
programme.desc: One of Kino’s favorite hobbies is learning how to say ‘Thank You’ in different languages. In this episode of Global Yoga, she's learning that special phrase in Hungarian, as she travels to Budapest. Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Alfredo Mushroom Pasta
programme.desc: Vegan fettuccine alfredo is easier to make than you might think.

programme.title: TWOFASTSLF1HSpanish
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Acceptance
programme.desc: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment. Join Kino as she skillfully uses upward facing dog as a tool for understanding this radical acceptance. Start with a short meditation on the breath and a feeling of being ok with the sensations in the body. Then begin the physical practice by awakening the central axis of the spine, extending and twisting your way through some warm up positions. Detail your alignment in the updog backbend with nuanced alignment work, making use of blocks where needed.

programme.title: Marichasana A
programme.desc: Tune in to the inner experience in this short flow that details a healthy use of breath and body in your yoga practice. This class builds up to Marichasana A.

programme.title: The Light at the End of the Tunnel, Happiness after the Storms of Depression Clears with Rob Mack and Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Happiness Coach, Robert Mack.

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Boredom in Yoga
programme.desc: Join kino for a conversation about boredom in the yoga practice, what it means, and what you can do about it.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Relaxation
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Upward Facing Dog
programme.desc: A restorative flow that stretches and warms the body with a prop assisted sequence. This class has a focus on the fundamental pose Upward Facing Dog.

programme.title: Hips - Love
programme.desc: The journey of awakening the hips is very much a journey of self-love and self-discovery. Join Kino for a 30-minute practice that’s all about learning to love your hips. Avoid the temptation to judge and manipulate or force your flexibility by training the mind to be present amidst what may be the murky territory of the inner body around the hips.
